requirement: Upload image/PDF invoices and persist records
notes: Web uploads store file blobs; Tauri uploads copy files into workspace and persist metadata

requirement: Extract and store invoice fields via OCR
notes: OCR output is normalized (date and amount parsing) before writing to database

requirement: Store invoice files and support retrieval
notes: Invoice file data is returned by invoice ID as base64 for preview
Client validates date range and server filters by invoice_date

requirement: Click record to view original invoice file
notes: Web fetches by invoice ID; Tauri previews directly from local file path

requirement: Statistics by filters (count and total amount)
notes: Statistics are computed using the same active filters as list queries
